title: Smoky Crispy Dutch Rye Bread Toast
description: A smoky, crispy vegetarian Dutch dish featuring rye bread, perfect for a delicious brunch.
instructions: Cut the rye bread into 1-inch thick slices.
Melt 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the melted butter and whisk to combine.
Brush the butter mixture onto both sides of the rye bread slices.
Place the bread slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the extra-virgin olive oil over the bread slices.
Bake the bread in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
While the bread is baking, thinly slice the red onion and chop the fresh parsley.
Once the bread is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool for 2-3 minutes.
Top the toasted rye bread with the sliced red onion, chopped parsley, and crumbled feta cheese (if using).
